name: ticker-takeover
title: Ticker Takeover
description: A mono ticker rolls through options, locks on a final word with an accent flash, and promotes it into a full-frame headline.

variables.label: Options
variables.description: Comma-separated words shown by the ticker.

variables.label: Final word
variables.description: Word the ticker locks on and promotes.

variables.label: Accent
variables.description: Color used for the lock flash and promoted word.
